title: lolium temulentum var. canadense
intro: Lolium temulentum var. canadense, also known as Canada ryegrass or darnel, is a variety of Lolium temulentum, a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Canada ryegrass include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Canada ryegrass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in traditional remedies for its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.
